title: Extracting Problem and Method Sentence from Scientific Papers: A Context-enhanced Transformer Using Formulaic Expression Desensitization
abstract: arXiv:2606.26481v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Billions of scientific papers lead to the need to identify essential parts from the massive text. Scientific research is an activity from putting forward problems to using methods. To learn the main idea from scientific papers, we focus on extracting problem and method sentences. Annotating sentences within scientific papers is labor-intensive, resulting in small-scale datasets that limit the amount of information models can learn. This limited information leads models to rely heavily on specific forms, which in turn reduces their generalization capabilities. This paper addresses the problems caused by small-scale datasets from three perspectives: increasing dataset scale, reducing dependence on specific forms, and enriching the information within sentences. To implement the first two ideas, we introduce the concept of formulaic expression (FE) desensitization and propose FE desensitization-based data augmenters to generate synthetic dat

Abstract: arXiv:2606.26481v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Billions of scientific papers lead to the need to identify essential parts from the massive text. translated_title: 从科学论文中提取问题与方法句子：一种利用公式化表达脱敏的上下文增强型Transformer
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26481v1 公告类型：新公告 摘要：数十亿篇科学论文导致需要从海量文本中识别关键部分。科学研究是一个从提出问题到使用方法的系列活动。为了从科学论文中学习主要思想，我们专注于提取问题和方法句子。对科学论文中的句子进行标注是劳动密集型的，导致数据集规模较小，限制了模型可以学习的信息量。这种有限的信息使得模型严重依赖特定形式，进而降低了其泛化能力。本文从三个角度解决了小规模数据集带来的问题：增加数据集规模、减少对特定形式的依赖、以及丰富句子内的信息。为了实现前两个想法，我们引入了公式化表达（FE）脱敏的概念，并提出了基于FE脱敏的数据增强器来生成合成数据。
tldr: 本文通过引入公式化表达脱敏和数据增强方法，从增加数据集规模、减少对特定形式的依赖和丰富句子信息三方面，解决了科学论文中问题与方法句子提取任务因小规模数据集导致的模型泛化能力不足问题。
en_tdlr: This paper addresses the issue of limited model generalization in extracting problem and method sentences from scientific papers caused by small-scale datasets, by introducing formulaic expression desensitization and data augmentation methods to increase dataset scale, reduce reliance on specific forms, and enrich sentence information.
